signals.headline: South Korea Annual Inflation Holds at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea Annual Inflation Holds at 2.0% in February 2026, Unchanged from January and Below Forecasts | NO | MED confidence**

signals.raw:
Interactive Brokers Launches SOL Trading for European Investors | YES | MED confidence**  
Interactive Brokers has launched Solana (SOL) trading for European investors via Zero Hash, expanding access on one of the world's largest brokerage platforms; this occurred recently amid SOL trading around $82 with strong fundamentals like 167 million network users and the Symbiosis protocol.[2]
